_meta.title: NOVIQ Engine — General Surgery Medical Logic Knowledge Base
_meta.source_authority: Dr. Mohamed Kassab (General Surgeon, Hybrid MD) — Clinical Intelligence Script Draft v1.1–v1.3 + Procedure Classification Sheet
_meta.description: Surgeon-authored medical logic rules, coding gates, clinical triggers, and keyword evidence for all General Surgery procedure categories. This is the Medical Logic Agent knowledge base for Phase 5 of the NOVIQ Engine Intelligence Layer.

evidence_hierarchy.rule: OT Notes > Pathology Report > Radiology > Admission Notes
evidence_hierarchy.description: Source of truth for coding decisions. The Discharge Summary alone is never sufficient — clinical documentation must support each code.
evidence_hierarchy.physician_note: The engine must prioritise Clinical Presentation over negative Radiology in children. If surgeon finds a perforated appendix despite a clear US, the Pathology Report is the ultimate source of truth for final coding.

SKIN_SOFT_TISSUE.category_logic: 6S Rule — documentation must address: Site, Size, Shape, Surface, Consistency, Specimen. Any upgrade in procedure complexity must be justified by documented measurements.

medical_logic.rule: Coding is strictly tied to the maximum diameter of the excised lesion.
medical_logic.audit_trigger: Cross-match size in OT Notes vs Pathology Report.
medical_logic.fwa_alert: Flag 'Large Excision' (>5cm) if pre-op Radiology/US shows a smaller mass — size discrepancy = upcoding risk.

coding_gates.upcode_guard: Reject large excision code if lesion diameter in pathology does not match OT Notes claim.

medical_logic.rule: Laser excision is a step up from standard excision — must be documented explicitly in OT Notes.
medical_logic.audit_trigger: Verify laser consumables are listed in theatre record.

medical_logic.rule: Justified ONLY by suspected or confirmed malignancy.
medical_logic.downgrade_rule: If WLE billed for a benign Lipoma without clinical justification → downgrade to Simple Excision.

coding_gates.upcode_guard: No WLE code without documented malignancy suspicion or confirmed histology.
coding_gates.pathology_link: Safety margins must be confirmed in pathology report — positive margins trigger Re-excision alert.

medical_logic.rule: Requires documented oncological indication. Safety margins in cm must appear in both OT Notes and Pathology.
medical_logic.audit_trigger: If margins are involved (positive), flag for Re-excision or Oncology Referral.

medical_logic.rule: Required for large defects or exposed vital structures. Must document pedicle identification, transposition/rotation maneuvers, and Doppler viability check.
medical_logic.evidence_required_in_OT: Identification of pedicle, transposition maneuver documented, Doppler check for flap viability.

THYROID_NECK.category_logic: Integration of Thyroid Profile (TSH/T3/T4), TIRADS Score, and T99 Nuclear Scan to justify surgical extent (Lobectomy vs Total). Key safety markers: RLN, TT, TIRADS, S/C.

medical_logic.rule: The diagnostic gateway. Must be correlated with TIRADS 3-5.
Step up from FNA — core biopsy provides histology not just cytology. Used when FNA is non-diagnostic.
Justified by Focal Lesion on one lobe via T99 Scan (Hot/Cold Nodule).
required_documentation: Unilateral RLN identification documented in OT Notes

medical_logic.rule: Justified by bilateral disease or high-risk TIRADS.
medical_logic.critical_evidence: Bilateral exploration, identification of BOTH Recurrent Laryngeal Nerves (RLN), and Parathyroid preservation must be documented.
medical_logic.safety_gate: Issue immediate alert if 'RLN' or 'Parathyroid' are not mentioned in OT Notes for Total Thyroidectomy.

clinical_intelligence_triggers.condition: Stridor in recovery notes or nursing notes
clinical_intelligence_triggers.engine_action: Expect ICU Admission or Emergency Re-exploration entry — flag if absent (life-saving procedure not documented)

medical_logic.ln_integrity_gate: Node count in OT Notes MUST match node count in Histopathology log. Mismatch = billing for phantom specimens.
medical_logic.audit_trigger: TIRADS 4/5 or FNA positive for malignancy required to justify LN dissection.
medical_logic.specimen_matcher: Number of containers sent to lab must match surgical description.

coding_gates.upcode_guard: Flag LN Dissection billed for TIRADS 2 (Benign Hyperplasia) without clinical evidence — downgrade to Total Thyroidectomy only.
coding_gates.pathology_link: LN count in OT Notes vs histopathology is the anti-fraud check.

APPENDECTOMY_EMERGENCY.category_logic: Pediatric patients (10-14 years) at highest risk for rapid perforation — omentum cannot localize infection at this age. Time-critical classification.

medical_logic.rule: Pediatric Gold Standard. For children (<14 years) OR suspected perforation/abscess — allows superior Peritoneal Lavage and direct drainage.

twelve_hour_rule.clinical_reason: Prevents SIRS, septicemia, or irreversible septic shock/coma

medical_logic.adult_rule: Adults classified as surgical emergency within 24-36 hours.
medical_logic.coding_trigger: Use for complicated appendicitis to ensure Lavage & Drainage coded as bundled components.

clinical_intelligence_triggers.engine_action: Trigger Quality Alert for potential Perforation
Upgrade case to Critical Care/ICU Logic

clinical_intelligence_triggers.condition: Keywords: Pus, Fecalith, Gangrenous in OT Notes
clinical_intelligence_triggers.engine_action: Auto-upgrade to Complicated Appendectomy (higher revenue tier)

medical_logic.rule: Adult standard for non-complicated cases. Faster recovery.
medical_logic.audit_gate: Cross-match Consumables (Trocars/Staplers) in theatre record to prevent upcoding from Open to Laparoscopic.

medical_logic.noviq_policy: NOVIQ will Flag/Reject robotic claims for appendectomy.
medical_logic.reasoning: Not FDA agreed for this indication; 95% rejection rate by global insurance payers.
medical_logic.engine_action: Auto-downgrade to Laparoscopic/Open to secure hospital revenue.

coding_gates.rejection_rule: Robotic Appendectomy → automatic downgrade flag to Laparoscopic. Alert physician before claim submission.

medical_logic.rule: Necessary when infection is Kinked or spreads to Ascending Colon and Terminal Ileum.
medical_logic.extension_logic: Allow complex coding ONLY when OT Notes AND Histopathology confirm gangrene or perforation involving cecum/colon.
medical_logic.pathology_link: Perforation extending to colon must be confirmed in pathology — not just suspected.

clinical_intelligence_triggers.condition: Kinked Appendix in OT Notes vs Pathology report
clinical_intelligence_triggers.engine_action: Confirm Right Hemicolectomy validity and prevent abuse

abbreviations.Fecalith: Hardened stool causing obstruction — coding trigger for complicated appendicitis

ABDOMINAL_WALL_HERNIA.category_logic: Mesh is a medical necessity (not cosmetic) for defects >3cm. The engine must link defect size from Radiology or OT Notes to mesh size documented in theatre record.

medical_logic.congenital_gate: In young patients, inguinal hernia is often classified as Congenital — 90% of policies reject congenital cases.
medical_logic.emergency_loophole: Covered only if documented as Emergency due to Strangulation or Cord Obstruction & Tear.
medical_logic.engine_action: Search for Ischemia, Tender mass, or Vascular compromise to justify as life-saving rather than elective congenital repair.

medical_logic.mesh_protocol: For Umbilical, Para-umbilical, and Incisional (Ventral) hernias, Proline Mesh is medical necessity, not option.
medical_logic.defect_threshold: Defect >3cm → mesh is mandatory clinical pathway to prevent recurrence.
medical_logic.defect_size_link: Engine must link Defect Size (from Radiology or OT Notes) to Mesh size in theatre record.

medical_logic.defect_logic: Mesh (15x15) is functionally necessary for large Defect — not cosmetic.
medical_logic.cosmetic_filter: Isolate Abdominoplasty as cosmetic (90% rejection). Alert: 'This term triggers insurance rejection. Use Complex Abdominal Wall Reconstruction instead.'

documentation_guidance.evidence_required: CT or Ultrasound showing Gap distance between Rectus muscles to support claim legitimacy

medical_logic.covered: Recti Plication covered when it restores integrity of abdominal wall — must be documented as Functional Reconstruction.
medical_logic.not_covered: Skin Redundancy Excision excluded unless causing chronic infections/intertrigo.

coding_gates.cosmetic_flag: Abdominoplasty component → patient-pay. Engine must separate functional repair code from cosmetic component and route cosmetic to patient bill.

clinical_intelligence_triggers.condition: Word 'Abdominoplasty' in OT Notes without documented functional defect
clinical_intelligence_triggers.engine_action: Alert physician: 'This term triggers insurance rejection. If procedure was to repair large defect, use Complex Abdominal Wall Reconstruction.'
Flag as High Rejection Risk (Congenital Clause)
Override Congenital Rejection. Approve as Emergency.

PROCTOLOGY_PERIANAL.category_logic: Surgery justified only for Grade 3-4 hemorrhoids. Pre-op DRE and/or Proctoscopy findings must be documented in Initial Assessment.

medical_logic.technology_guard: Reject Laser code in 70% of claims — alert for Upcoding. Laser for hemorrhoids is rarely clinically superior to standard excision.
medical_logic.engine_action: Flag laser hemorrhoidectomy claim for clinical necessity review.

medical_logic.grade_gate: Coverage for Grade 3 and 4 ONLY. Harmonic is not medically justified for hemorrhoids.
medical_logic.harmonic_guard: Reject Harmonic code — alert for Upcoding. Harmonic device is not standard of care for hemorrhoid surgery.

medical_logic.sphincter_gate: Low Fissure/Fistula: Simple, below internal sphincter. Day case.
medical_logic.high_distinction: High Fistula: Crosses internal sphincter — requires staged 2-3 session plan.

medical_logic.sphincter_gate: High cases penetrate Internal Sphincter — require 2-3 sessions.
medical_logic.seton_rule: Presence of 'Seton Placement' in OT Notes → automatically classify as High/Complex Fistula. Setons are NEVER used for simple/low cases.
medical_logic.complexity_trigger: Seton + Trans-sphincteric → auto-upgrade case classification + justify multiple OT sessions.
evidence_required: Pre-op MRI Perianal or EUA to confirm tract level
Seton placement documented in OT Notes

clinical_intelligence_triggers.engine_action: Flag for Down-coding or rejection (Conservative treatment preferred)

clinical_intelligence_triggers.condition: Painful, purple mass, non-reducible in ER notes
clinical_intelligence_triggers.engine_action: Auto-verify as Emergency Surgery (High Priority) — overrides Grade 2/3 rejection

clinical_intelligence_triggers.condition: Harmonic device used in Hemorrhoid surgery
clinical_intelligence_triggers.engine_action: Trigger Claim Rejection Risk alert
Upgrade to Emergency/Critical Care Logic

clinical_intelligence_triggers.condition: Trans-sphincteric or High mentioned in OT Notes
clinical_intelligence_triggers.engine_action: Allow Repeated OT Sessions (Staged coding)
Flag for Medical Necessity Review before surgery
Force Histopathology Report link to claim — flag if absent

abbreviations.EUA: Examination Under Anesthesia (crucial for High Fistula)

BILIARY_CHOLECYSTECTOMY.category_logic: Laparoscopic Cholecystectomy is the Medical Standard. Open is reserved for failed laparoscopy or dense adhesions. Small stones are paradoxically more critical than large ones.

medical_logic.small_stone_paradox: Small stones (Microlithiasis) are MORE critical than large stones — high risk of CBD migration causing Obstructive Jaundice or Acute Pancreatitis.
medical_logic.audit_trigger: If US shows Multiple small stones → engine expects pre-op Liver Profile (Direct Bilirubin/ALP) check.
medical_logic.adhesiolysis_guard: Adhesiolysis during Cholecystectomy is Rejected as a separate code UNLESS patient has documented history of previous abdominal surgery (e.g., Previous C-Section).
medical_logic.adhesiolysis_exception: Previous C-Section or Midline Scar documented in admission → allow Adhesiolysis/Exploration coding without rejection.

clinical_intelligence_triggers.engine_action: Upgrade to High Risk/Urgent; check for CBD clearance

clinical_intelligence_triggers.condition: Previous CS or Midline Scar in admission notes
clinical_intelligence_triggers.engine_action: Allow Adhesiolysis/Exploration coding without rejection
Link to Acute Pancreatitis diagnosis (higher severity tier)
Flag for Payer Rejection unless BMI > 40 or complex history

coding_gates.rejection_rule: Flag for Payer Rejection for simple cholecystitis. Justified only if BMI > 40 or documented complex surgical history.

BILIARY_CHOLECYSTECTOMY.physician_note: The engine must prioritise Time of Admission. Cholecystitis requiring IV Antibiotics and Analgesics for 24 hours before surgery justifies higher Level of Care (Emergency Admission) than elective cold case.

abbreviations.ERCP: Endoscopic Retrograde Cholangiopancreatography (tool for CBD stones)

COLORECTAL_HPB_COMPLEX.category_logic: Highest complexity tier. Requires multi-disciplinary documentation. Pathology margins are the final coding authority.

stoma_protocol.step_2: Re-anastomosis & Closure — after 3-6 months, second admission
stoma_protocol.coding_rule: These are TWO SEPARATE MAJOR PROCEDURES. Both must be coded and pre-authorized separately to prevent revenue loss on second stage.

medical_logic.integrity_gate: Block financial claim without Pathology Report confirming Tumor and Safety Margins.
medical_logic.safety_margin_alert: If margins are positive in pathology → flag for Re-excision or Oncology Referral.

clinical_intelligence_triggers.engine_action: Alert: Check for Primary Pathology (Cancer/Perforation)
Block claim submission — Pathology with margins required

medical_logic.rule: Highest complexity tier. Reserved for Cancer Head of Pancreas or Cholecystic Sarcoma.
medical_logic.max_tier_trigger: Keywords 'Duodenojejunostomy' OR 'Whipple' → automatically trigger Maximum Complexity Tier and highest reimbursement claim.
medical_logic.icu_requirement: High ICU stay and multi-disciplinary team documentation required.
medical_logic.engine_action: Auto-upgrade to Maximum Procedure Value on detection of Whipple or Duodenojejunostomy keyword.

global_coding_rules.specimen_matcher: Number of containers sent to lab MUST match surgical description — prevents billing for phantom specimens.
global_coding_rules.pathology_supremacy: Pathology Report is the ultimate source of truth for final coding. Clinical presentation does not override confirmed pathology.

robotic_rules: Robotic Cholecystectomy → flag unless BMI > 40 or complex history
Robotic Inguinal Hernia → flag for payer rejection unless documented clinical justification
laser_rules: Laser Hemorrhoidectomy → clinical necessity review (70% payer rejection rate)
Harmonic for Hemorrhoids → Claim Rejection Risk alert
